page.title: Sea Freight
hero.heading: Sea Freight Excellence: Reliable Ocean Logistics
hero.desc: Comprehensive import and export shipping solutions connecting Morocco to every major global port. Whether you need a full container or shared space, MH Cargo provides cost-effective ocean freight through Tanger Med and Casablanca.
included.title: What is included in this service
included.desc: We deliver strategic inbound and outbound sea logistics for businesses of all sizes. From raw materials to finished products, we ensure efficient, reliable, and cost-effective ocean shipping.
feature1.title: FCL (Full Container Load):
feature1.desc: Ideal for large shipments requiring a dedicated container. We offer a variety of container types to suit your specific cargo needs, ensuring maximum security and efficiency.
feature2.title: LCL (Less than Container Load — Groupage):
feature2.desc: A cost-effective solution for smaller shipments. We consolidate your cargo with others, allowing you to pay only for the space you use.
feature3.title: Import & Export Management:
feature3.desc: Strategic inbound logistics for businesses sourcing from Asia, Europe, and the Americas — and reliable export services to support your international growth.
why.title: Why Choose Sea Freight?
why.desc: Sea freight is the most cost-effective solution for high-volume trade. MH Cargo specializes in Moroccan port operations, giving you a competitive edge on every shipment.
why.bullet1: Strategic coverage via Tanger Med & Casablanca
why.bullet2: Competitive rates through global shipping line partnerships
why.bullet3: FCL and LCL options for all cargo volumes
